fields.title: Migrate recurring spec principles to canonical rule entries via spec sync-generated

Migrate recurring spec principles to canonical rule entries via spec sync-generated
fields.validation_summary: Revalidated 2026-05-31: the recurring-principles generated.toml files and per-workspace recurring-principles rule-target configs exist, but the acceptance workflow still fails. After bootstrapping the manifest-only .spec and .rule stores with spec init/rule init for the root, memory-api, and viewer-api workspaces, spec sync-generated for the root recurring-principles spec (954d9807-f357-41e5-9fd4-b1da39e0933d) was not byte-stable: the second run changed the spec directory hash from 4e74cf2ed96ceb864171ffd5df456152ec27e68bdeac61449f1bc8441d43154d to c8bba92dbf4e7eaeb566b4913614c3bae34a89f0daf30f491df040e3b92f05c4. Nested workspace checks were not continued after the root idempotence failure.
